name: @deltos/client
description: deltos PWA shell — the installable local-first surface host. Phase 0 is an empty-but-real shell.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.sw.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.sw.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
